ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., local, state, national) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for voter registration */,
  "voter_eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Details on voter eligibility criteria */,
  "early_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for early voting */,
  "early_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date for early voting */,
  "absentee_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for absentee voting */,
  "absentee_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date for absentee voting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "candidate_bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the candidate */,
  "candidate_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the candidate's photo */,
  "candidate_website" TEXT /* URL to the candidate's official website */,
  "candidate_social_media" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the candidate's social media profiles */,
  "candidate_political_platform" TEXT /* A brief description of the candidate's political platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the party */,
  "party_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party (e.g., DEM, REP, CON) */,
  "party_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the party's logo */,
  "party_website" TEXT /* URL to the party's official website */,
  "party_social_media" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the party's social media profiles */,
  "party_leadership" TEXT /* JSON object containing details of the party's leadership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "district" TEXT /* District the precinct belongs to */,
  "precinct_address" TEXT /* Address of the precinct */,
  "precinct_contact_info" TEXT /* JSON object containing contact information for the precinct */,
  "precinct_population" INTEGER /* Population of the precinct */,
  "precinct_voting_location" TEXT /* Location where voting takes place in the precinct */,
  "precinct_voting_hours" TEXT /* JSON object containing voting hours for the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct where the vote was cast */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the vote was cast for */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the vote was cast in */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the candidate in the precinct */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., in-person, absentee, early) */,
  "vote_method" TEXT /* Method of voting (e.g., paper, electronic) */,
  "vote_time" TEXT /* Time when the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voters" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "voter_name" TEXT /* Full name of the voter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the voter */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct the voter belongs to */,
  "voter_address" TEXT /* Address of the voter */,
  "voter_date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the voter */,
  "voter_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voter */,
  "voter_race" TEXT /* Race of the voter */,
  "voter_ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the voter */,
  "voter_registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the voter registered */,
  "voter_voting_history" TEXT /* JSON object containing the voter's voting history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voters_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vote_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote share */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the vote share belongs to */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct the vote share belongs to */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the vote share belongs to */,
  "share_count" REAL /* Percentage of votes cast for the candidate in the precinct */,
  "vote_share_type" TEXT /* Type of vote share (e.g., in-person, absentee, early) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_shares_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_shares_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_shares_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "write_in_votes" (
  "write_in_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each write-in vote */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct the write-in vote was cast in */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the write-in candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the write-in vote was cast in */,
  "write_in_count" INTEGER /* Number of write-in votes cast for the candidate in the precinct */,
  "write_in_vote_type" TEXT /* Type of write-in vote (e.g., in-person, absentee, early) */,
  "write_in_vote_method" TEXT /* Method of write-in voting (e.g., paper, electronic) */,
  "write_in_vote_time" TEXT /* Time when the write-in vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("write_in_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_write_in_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_write_in_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spoiled_ballots" (
  "spoiled_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spoiled ballot */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct the spoiled ballot belongs to */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the spoiled ballot belongs to */,
  "spoiled_count" INTEGER /* Number of spoiled ballots in the precinct */,
  "spoiled_ballot_type" TEXT /* Type of spoiled ballot (e.g., in-person, absentee, early) */,
  "spoiled_ballot_reason" TEXT /* Reason why the ballot was spoiled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spoiled_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spoiled_ballots_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spoiled_ballots_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter turnout */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct the voter turnout belongs to */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the voter turnout belongs to */,
  "turnout_count" INTEGER /* Number of voters who turned out in the precinct */,
  "turnout_type" TEXT /* Type of turnout (e.g., in-person, absentee, early) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the result belongs to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the result belongs to */,
  "result_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the candidate in the election */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., in-person, absentee, early) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "district_geography" TEXT /* JSON object containing geographical information about the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "user_access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "user_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
